meta.title: VELORA — Crafted for the Modern Taste
meta.description: Velora is a premium cafe and restaurant blending specialty coffee, seasonal dining, and cinematic ambience for the modern generation.

hero.heading: Crafted for the Modern Taste
hero.subheading: A cinematic cafe & dining experience where specialty coffee, seasonal plates, and warm hospitality meet.

about.heading: A decade of quiet obsession with craft
about.story: Velora began as a single espresso counter in 2014, built on a simple belief: hospitality is a craft, not a transaction. Today it has grown into a full culinary destination, but the founding obsession with detail hasn't changed.
about.mission: To create a space where exceptional taste and genuine warmth coexist — every visit, every order, every plate.

values.title: Craft
values.description: Every recipe is refined obsessively before it reaches your table.

values.title: Sourcing
values.description: Direct relationships with growers and farms across every ingredient.

values.title: Warmth
values.description: Genuine hospitality that never feels performative.

timeline.title: First counter opens
timeline.description: A single espresso bar in a 12-seat space.

timeline.title: Kitchen expands
timeline.description: Full dining menu launches alongside the original cafe.

timeline.title: Second location
timeline.description: Velora opens its first branch beyond the flagship.

timeline.title: Digital ordering
timeline.description: Reservations and ordering go fully online for every guest.

services.heading: One space, every ritual
services.subheading: From your morning espresso to an evening tasting menu, Velora is built to adapt to every occasion.

menu.heading: Digitally crafted, beautifully served
menu.subheading: Browse by category, filter to your taste, and order straight to your table or door.

gallery.heading: A look inside Velora
gallery.subheading: Moments from the counter, the kitchen, and the tables in between.

reviews.heading: Loved by guests worldwide
reviews.subheading: Real words from the people who keep coming back.

process.heading: From craving to table in four steps

steps.title: Choose
steps.description: Browse the digital menu and pick exactly what you're craving.

steps.title: Reserve
steps.description: Book your table or schedule pickup in under a minute.

steps.title: Enjoy
steps.description: Settle in — we'll handle every detail of the experience.

steps.title: Review
steps.description: Tell us how it went. We read every word.

contact.subheading: Questions, private events, or feedback — reach out any time.
